item.title: OpenSCAD
item.description: The Programmers Solid 3D CAD Modeller

item.title: Converseen
item.description: Converseen is a batch image converter and resizer

item.title: LeoCAD
item.description: A CAD application for creating virtual LEGO models

item.title: Blockbench
item.description: Blockbench is a free, modern model editor for low-poly and boxy models with pixel art textures

item.title: PrusaSlicer
item.description: PrusaSlicer takes 3D models (STL, OBJ, AMF) and converts them into G-code instructions for FFF printers or PNG layers for mSLA 3D printers

item.title: Bambu Studio
item.description: Bambu Studio is an open-source, cutting-edge, feature-rich slicing software

item.title: draw.io
item.description: Security-first diagramming for teams.

item.title: LibreCAD
item.description: LibreCAD is a 2D Computer Aided Design (CAD) application for creating plans and designs on your computer

item.title: Bforartists
item.description: Bforartists is a fork of the popular 3D software Blender, with the goal to improve the UI

item.title: Friction
item.description: Powerful and versatile free and open-source motion graphics application.

item.title: FreeCAD
item.description: FreeCAD is a general purpose Open Source 3D CAD/MCAD/CAx/CAE/PLM modeler

item.title: Cura
item.description: 3D printer / slicing GUI built on top of the Uranium framework

item.title: digiKam
item.description: Professional Photo Management with Power of Open Source

item.title: Laigter
item.description: Laigter is a tool that automatically generates maps for dynamic lighting effects in games

item.title: Figma-Linux
item.description: Figma is the first interface design tool based in the browser, making it easier for teams to create software

item.title: Inkscape
item.description: A Free and open source vector graphics editor

item.title: Krita
item.description: Krita is a professional free and open source painting program

item.title: Lychee
item.description: Lychee simplifies the printing process and makes 3D printing accessible to everyone by offering the most innovative and user-friendly solutions.

item.title: RawTherapee
item.description: RawTherapee is a free, cross-platform raw image processing program

item.title: Pencil2D
item.description: Pencil2D is an easy, intuitive tool to make 2D hand-drawn animations. Pencil2D is open source and cross-platform.

item.title: Upscayl
item.description: Free and Open Source AI Image Upscaler for Linux, MacOS and Windows built with Linux-First philosophy.

item.title: ksnip
item.description: ksnip the cross-platform screenshot and annotation tool

item.title: qView
item.description: Practical and minimal image viewer

item.title: Bridge
item.description: Quixel Bridge is a software that lets you browse, download, and export 3D assets from Megascans and MetaHumans libraries with one click

item.title: FontForge
item.description: An outline font editor

item.title: MyPaint
item.description: A fast and dead-simple painting app for artists
